regions.text: Noises and songs are sounds. What are sounds? They are the effects of waves in the air. These are waves in the sea.
These are waves in a cord. One end of the cord is fixed to a tree and the boy has the other end. He is shaking it up and down.
With every shake he sends a wave down the cord to the tree.
As the wave goes down the cord this part, which was up, goes down. And this part, which was down, goes up.
